jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Flipkart
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Flipkart in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
